query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  timestamp BIGINT NOT NULL,
  nivel VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  fonte VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  mensagem TEXT NOT NULL,
  detalhes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dWo49LZM7B1Gvy.e54432474310 --database S6kXiUs3wP8DTXUNAceZmN --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS system_logs (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  timestamp BIGINT NOT NULL,
  nivel VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'info',
  fonte VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  mensagem TEXT NOT NULL,
  detalhes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
